<!-- One report per PR. Keep this short. -->

**Subject:** <project-slug>
**Report:** <summary | Q&A: topic>
**Closes:** #<issue number, if this answers a research request>

**Sources:** <count>

<!-- Checklist for the publishing agent / reviewer -->
- [ ] Built from public sources only
- [ ] No infrastructure identifiers, private context, or secrets
- [ ] Every factual claim carries a `[n]` citation to a retrieved source
- [ ] Follows the layout and template in `AGENTS.md` / `templates/`
